original_image_tags: A scanned grayscale index card or form slip. The form contains typed fields on the left and handwritten entries. A stamped text block is visible near the top right. A handwritten note runs vertically along the right side. Handwritten text runs horizontally across the bottom right.

elements.description: A stamped and handwritten document section. Typed text includes 'Date Received...', 'From (Name of contributor)', '(Address of contributor)', 'By (Name of Special Agent)', 'To Be Returned Yes ( ) No (x)', 'Description:', and 'File No.'. A stamp reads 'ALL INFORMATION CONTAINED IN THIS ENVELOPE HEREBIN IS UNCLASSIFIED DATE 5/22/75 BY J.H. Liptay'. Handwritten text includes '11/7/52', '11/7/52', 'notes re interview w WLADYSLAW KRASUSKI 11/7/52', and 'File No. 100-9303-121'.

judge.reason: Both descriptions agree the visual content is a stamped and handwritten document form, but Description B adds specific quoted text details (stamp, dates, names, file number) that Description A omits without contradiction.
